title: Verify 'Manage Trial' section navigates to the Trial Corner hub
description: Test that the existing 'Manage Trial' functionality is replaced and now redirects users in the cohort to the Trial Corner.
preconditions: User is in the Trial Corner cohort

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the user Profile or Settings
2. Locate and click on the 'Manage Trial' option

expected_result: The user is navigated to the 'Trial Corner' screen, not the old trial management page.
